bird.name: 褐背针尾雨燕
bird.summary: 褐背针尾雨燕（台湾作褐喉針尾雨燕）（学名：Hirundapus giganteus），是雨燕目雨燕科的一种鸟类。 特征 褐背针尾雨燕体重约127克，翼长约203.1毫米，嘴峰长约10.1毫米，喙宽度约5.6毫米，喙厚度约4.1毫米，跗蹠长约17.8毫米，尾长约61.7毫米。褐背…

relations.subject: 褐背针尾雨燕
relations.evidence: These swifts are resident breeders in hill forests in southern India and southeast Asia, extending to the Greater Sunda islands of Indonesia and Palawan in the southern Philippines. They build their nests in rock crevices in cliffs, laying 3-5 eggs
relations.object_summary: 大型猛禽和食腐鸟偏好的高崖栖息环境。
